posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve been busy over the last few weeks making updates and improvements to the API and apps. Check out what’s changed below!

API

  • As a reminder, 2024-04 will become the default version on April 1st, 2024
  • New Javascript SDK and CLI
  • Breaking changes to app installs queries in 2024-04
  • Mutations with the column_values argument now accept both strings and integers

Apps

  • New parameter for open plan selection SDK method
  • Updates to marketplace user support
